nasb.text: The sons of Shimon were Amnon and Rinnah, Benhanan and Tilon. And the sons of Ishi were Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.

esv.text: The sons of Shimon: Amnon, Rinnah, Ben-hanan, and Tilon. The sons of Ishi: Zoheth and Ben-zoheth.

cnv.text: 示門的兒子是暗嫩、林拿、便．哈南和提倫。以示的兒子是梭黑和便．梭黑。

ccb.text: 示门的儿子是暗嫩、林拿、便·哈南和提伦。以示的儿子是梭黑和便·梭黑。
